pages.title: ⚠ Blood Moon Warning
pages.text: Every $(bold)7 in-game days$(), the sky turns red at nightfall. This is a Blood Moon.$(br2)During a Blood Moon:$(br)— Hostile mobs spawn in significantly larger swarms$(br)— Mobs move faster and deal more damage$(br)— The effect lasts until dawn$(br2)$(bold)Do not be caught outside without gear during a Blood Moon.$() Even iron armor isn't enough without a solid strategy.

pages.title: Surviving It
pages.text: $(bold)Best approach:$() be inside a sealed structure before nightfall.$(br2)You can tell a Blood Moon is coming when the moon rises red. Sleep if you have a bed — sleeping skips the Blood Moon entirely.$(br2)If you must fight: use high ground, choke points, and AoE attacks. Do not engage in open terrain.$(br2)The Blood Moon resets at dawn. Surviving it earns Astra Coins from a quest in Chapter 1.
